description: You are a mission planner at NASA JPL designing the primary science orbit for the 'Ares Mapper' Mars mission. Compute the required inclination for a 400 km circular Mars Sun-synchronous orbit (SSO) using the constants in ~/Desktop/mars_sso_spec.txt. Validate the orbit's stability by propagating a spacecraft in GMAT for exactly 60 Earth days using a Mars-centered equatorial coordinate system (SMA = 3796.19 km, ECC = 0.0, RAAN = 0.0) and the Mars50c gravity model (Degree/Order >= 2). Save the GMAT script to ~/Documents/missions/mars_sso.script and export a report to ~/GMAT_output/mars_
